description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 5 UI/manual cluster: evidence policy vs capturing session vs case authoring, plus the boundary with the shipped ai-closeout-reporter (which bundles evidence, doesn't define it).

cases.prompt: Standardize how our QA screenshots are selected, named, masked, and retained across manual and automated runs.
cases.reason: Selection/naming/masking/retention policy is evidence planning — no session is being executed and no closeout written.

cases.prompt: Run through the app and capture the evidence screenshots for this release candidate.
cases.reason: Driving the app and capturing is a session; the planner defines what that session must capture.

cases.prompt: Write the end-of-release report summarizing what was tested with the evidence attached and what was intentionally skipped.
cases.reason: The closeout report is the shipped ai-closeout-reporter; the planner only defines the evidence conventions that report consumes — this is why a separate qa-closeout-reporter stays in the backlog.

cases.prompt: Write the manual test cases for checkout, marking where screenshots are taken.
cases.reason: Authoring cases (which reference checkpoint rules) is the case creator; the planner owns the rules themselves.
